items.label: Development Complete — Schemas
messages: Now I have full context. Let me implement the schema changes.  **Intent: Implementing HealthResponseSchema for health-badge feature**
Good - this is a purely additive change (new file + barrel export update). No blast radius concerns. Let me create the schema and tests now.
Now let me add the tests for the new schema:
Now let me build and test:
All 38 tests pass (including 8 new HealthResponseSchema tests). Now let me run the post-change review:

Review confirms: **no breaking changes**, **minimal structural impact** (1.8% footprint), **zero new issues**, health score unchanged. This is a clean additive change.  Now let me commit and mark completion:

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh backend "feat(schemas): add HealthResponseSchema for health-badge feature" 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete health-badge schema-dev 2>&1
